Interesting - the session_status shows 40k/200k (20%) which is different from the context monitor's 72%. The context monitor might be measuring differently (perhaps including the system prompt or other factors). 

In any case, we're at 20% according to the session status, which is well within limits. The 72% might be a different measurement. Either way, no action needed at this point.
